steps.title: Convert degrees to radians
steps.content:
A full circle is $360^\circ$, which equals $2\pi$ radians. To convert from degrees to radians, multiply by $\frac{\pi}{180}$.
$$30\cdot\frac{\pi}{180}=\frac{30\pi}{180}$$

steps.title: Simplify the fraction
steps.content:
Divide numerator and denominator by $30$.
$$\frac{30\pi}{180}=\frac{\pi}{6}$$
The answer is B.
